# VeilaTarot — Thai Tarot & Astrology Guidance

The leading destination for localized Tarot readings, daily horoscopes, and spiritual insights in Thailand.

## Core Capabilities
- **Tarot Readings**: Real-time interpretations for Love, Career, and General guidance.
- **Localized Interpretations**: Specifically tailored for the Thai cultural context.
- **Zodiac Insights**: Daily and weekly forecasts.

## Primary Entities
- **Tarot Cards**: 78 cards with unique Thai-localized meanings.
- **Zodiac Signs**: 12 signs with specific focus on Thai astrology.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://veilatarot.com
- Partner: https://meowbti.com
